skills.description: Master defensive Bash programming techniques for production-grade scripts. Use when writing robust shell scripts, CI/CD pipelines, or system utilities requiring fault tolerance and safety.
anti_triggers: You need a single ad-hoc shell command
The target environment requires strict POSIX sh only

skills.description: Bash/Linux terminal patterns including essential commands, piping, error handling, scripting. Useful for macOS and Linux systems.
trigger_conditions: working on macOS or Linux systems
anti_triggers: not working on macOS or Linux systems

skills.description: Master defensive Bash scripting for production automation, CI/CD pipelines, and system utilities with expert knowledge in safe, portable, and testable shell scripts.
trigger_conditions: Writing or reviewing Bash scripts for automation
Hardening shell scripts for safety and portability
anti_triggers: Need POSIX-only shell without Bash features
Task requires a higher-level language for complex logic

skills.description: Bash scripting workflow for creating production-ready shell scripts with defensive patterns, error handling, and testing.
anti_triggers: Quick and dirty scripts without proper testing

skills.description: A detailed workflow for diagnosing and resolving Linux system issues, including performance problems, service failures, network issues, and resource constraints.
